languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. My path of Knowledge has changed its trajectory yet again — that is the way of things. You have been a waymark on my path, Rogue Trader. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн учтиво меняет угол парения корпуса в поклоне.{/n} "Я покину судно при первой возможности. Мой путь Познания вновь сменил свою траекторию — такое случается. Вы стали важной вехой в нем, Вольный Торговец, и я надеюсь, что вы со временем обретете многие мудрости, которые не смог постичь я сам".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn altera decorosamente el ángulo de flotación de su torso para dedicarte una reverencia.{/n} «Me marcharé de la nave en cuanto tenga ocasión. Mi camino hacia el saber ha vuelto a cambiar de trayectoria; así son las cosas. Ha sido un faro en mi camino, Comerciante. Espero que, con el tiempo, adquiera los conocimientos que yo no he sido capaz de comprender».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."

Mi camino hacia el saber ha vuelto a cambiar de trayectoria; así son las cosas. Ha sido un faro en mi camino, Comerciante. Espero que, con el tiempo, adquiera los conocimientos que yo no he sido capaz de comprender».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡得体地调整了躯干悬浮的高度，微微鞠了一躬。{/n}“我会在第一时间离开这艘舰船。我的求知之路再次改变了轨迹，这也是常态。您曾是我路途上的一座路标，行商浪人。我希望，假以时日，您能获得那些我尚未领悟的智慧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡得体地调整了躯干悬浮的高度，微微鞠了一躬。{/n}“我会在第一时间离开这艘舰船。我的求知之路再次改变了轨迹，这也是常态。您曾是我路途上的一座路标，行商浪人。我希望，假以时日，您能获得那些我尚未领悟的智慧。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn incline gracieusement son torse en suspension pour faire une révérence.{/n} « Je débarquerai du vaisseau dès que l'occasion se présentera. La voie qui me conduit à la connaissance change à nouveau de trajectoire ; tel est l'ordre des choses. Vous aurez été un jalon sur mon chemin, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'espère qu'avec le temps, vous accumulerez toute la sagesse qui m'aura échappé. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. My path of Knowledge has changed its trajectory yet again — that is the way of things. You have been a waymark on my path, Rogue Trader. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."

J'espère qu'avec le temps, vous accumulerez toute la sagesse qui m'aura échappé. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ändert umständlich die Neigung seines schwebenden Torsos, um sich zu verbeugen.{/n} "Ich werde das Schiff bei erster Gelegenheit verlassen. Meine Suche nach Wissen schlägt einmal mehr eine neue Richtung ein ... das ist der Lauf der Dinge. Ihr wart eine Wegmarke auf meinem Pfad, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet zu gegebener Zeit die Weisheit erlangen, die mir verwehrt blieb."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn decorously alters the pitch of his torso's hovering to make a bow{/n} "I will depart the ship at the first opportunity. My path of Knowledge has changed its trajectory yet again — that is the way of things. You have been a waymark on my path, Rogue Trader. I hope that, in time, you will gain much wisdom that I have been unable to comprehend."

Ich hoffe, Ihr werdet zu gegebener Zeit die Weisheit erlangen, die mir verwehrt blieb."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはお辞儀をするように、胴体のホバリングのピッチを優雅に変えた。{/n}「機会があり次第、私はこの艦を去る。私の知識の道は、またしてもその軌道を変えた――それが物事の道理というものだ。ローグ・トレーダーよ、君は私の道のりの道しるべだった。やがて、私が理解しえなかった多くの知恵を君が得ることを願っている。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, gövdesinin süzülme eğimini uygun bir şekilde değiştirerek selam veriyor.{/n} "İlk fırsatta gemiden ayrılacağım. İrfan yolum yine yön değiştirdi. Eşyanın tabiatı böyledir. Yolumdaki bir durak oldunuz Hür Tacir. Umarım zamanla benim kavrayamadığım pek çok bilgeliğe erişirsiniz."
